Aitken Creek Lateral Capacity for April 19, 2026


Notice Text:

Further to Notice #176552, Westcoast will be allowing the following flow on the Aitken Creek Lateral:

Aitken Creek Lateral Capacity:

April 19, 2026: 419,800 GJ

Changes in operating conditions may result in the capacity being recalled on any gas cycle.

If you have any questions, please contact the CSR hotline at (403) 699-1800
